info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Bloomberg Analytics API
Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Calculate fixed income analytics

items.docs: Compute fixed income analytics for one or more securities, including yield to maturity, modified duration, convexity, spread measures, and cash flow projections.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Get fixed income cash flows

items.docs: Retrieve projected cash flow schedules for fixed income securities, including coupon payments, principal payments, and prepayment projections for mortgage-backed securities.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Price a derivative instrument

items.docs: Calculate the theoretical price and Greeks for derivative instruments including options, futures, swaps, and structured products using Bloomberg's pricing models.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Calculate option Greeks

items.docs: Compute option Greeks (delta, gamma, theta, vega, rho) for one or more options or option portfolios.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Run scenario analysis

items.docs: Perform what-if scenario analysis on a portfolio or set of securities by applying hypothetical changes to market variables such as interest rates, credit spreads, equity prices, or volatility.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Run stress test

items.docs: Execute stress tests on a portfolio using predefined historical scenarios or custom hypothetical shocks. Returns the projected portfolio impact under each stress scenario.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions List predefined stress scenarios

items.docs: Retrieve a list of predefined historical stress scenarios available for testing, such as the 2008 financial crisis, COVID-19 market shock, or rate hike scenarios.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions List available yield curves

items.docs: Retrieve a list of available yield curves, including sovereign, swap, and corporate curves for various currencies.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Get yield curve data

items.docs: Retrieve the full yield curve data including term structure points, zero rates, forward rates, and discount factors for a specific curve as of a given date.

info.name: Bloomberg Buyside Enterprise Solutions Evaluate security prices

items.docs: Calculate theoretical prices for securities using Bloomberg's pricing models, with optional overrides for valuation parameters.
